name: 加利尔AR | 废墟黄昏
descriptionEn: A less expensive option among the terrorist-exclusive assault rifles, the Galil AR is a serviceable weapon in medium to long-range combat. Ancient gods are obscured in the background of this foliage-adorned pattern. \"Eyes up everyone—we're being watched...\"
descriptionZh: 在T专用的突击步枪中，这把武器是较为便宜的选择，加利尔AR是一把中远距离作战的耐用武器。 这把武器采用了树叶花纹装饰的背景图案，古老的神像在其中若隐若现。 不管你如何隐藏，我们都被一视同仁地监控着。
